intro: Apium graveolens, commonly known as celery seed, is a natural powder derived from the seeds of the celery plant. Rich in antioxidants and bioactive compounds, this powder has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of inflammation. Apium graveolens powder is also believed to have anti-cancer properties and may help to boost the immune system due to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids.
